name: pdf-reading
description: Use this skill when you need to read, inspect, or extract content from PDF files — especially when file content is NOT in your context and you need to read it from disk. Covers content inventory, text extraction, page rasterization for visual inspection, embedded image/attachment/table/form-field extraction, and choosing the right reading strategy for different document types (text-heavy, scanned, slide-decks, forms, data-heavy). Do NOT use this skill for PDF creation, form filling, merging, spl
author: SeifBenayed
summary_zh: 这是一个专门读取和提取本地PDF内容的工具，适合需要直接从磁盘获取文件内部数据，或针对扫描件、表单等不同类型文档智能匹配读取策略的场景。
